description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard parcel box, light brown in color, with red branding and text printed on its surfaces. The box features a prominent red logo resembling arrows and a central 'H' on two of its longer sides, and printed information including weight, dimensions (5 kg, 40×24×21 cm), a barcode, a QR code, and Cyrillic text on the shorter sides. The top of the box also displays red text, likely indicating the service or company name. The cardboard appears to be corrugated, providing structural rigidity for shipping and handling. The box is sealed and does not show any visible openings or flaps, suggesting it is ready for transport. This type of parcel is commonly used for deliveries in urban environments, such as by courier or postal services.
description: A sealed rectangular cardboard parcel box with red branding, Cyrillic text, and shipping information printed on its surfaces.
description_view_0: The short end of the box displays shipping details, a barcode, a QR code, and Cyrillic text in red.
description_view_1: The long side of the box features a large red logo resembling arrows and a central 'H', with no additional text.
description_view_2: The opposite short end also shows shipping details and a barcode, but without the QR code and with less text.
description_view_3: The other long side displays the same red logo and includes red Cyrillic text above it.
